mapper.select: select count(1) from jst_student_channel_binding where channel_id = #{channelId} and status = 'active' and del_flag = '0'

select b.user_id as userId, u.nickname as nickname, u.avatar as avatar, b.bind_time as bindTime, b.status as bindStatus, coalesce(o.total_order_count, 0) as totalOrderCount, coalesce(o.total_paid_amount, 0.00) as totalPaidAmount from jst_student_channel_binding b left join jst_user u on u.user_id = b.user_id and u.del_flag = '0' left join ( select user_id, count(1) as total_order_count, coalesce(sum(case when order_status in ('paid', 'reviewing', 'in_service', 'aftersale', 'completed') then net_pay_amount else 0 end), 0.00) as total_paid_amount from jst_order_main where del_flag = '0' group by user_id ) o on o.user_id = b.user_id where b.channel_id = #{channelId} and b.del_flag = '0'
and b.status = #{bindStatus}
and b.status = 'active'
and ( cast(b.user_id as char) like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or ifnull(u.nickname, '') like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or ifnull(u.real_name, '') like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or ifnull(u.mobile, '') like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
order by b.bind_time desc, b.binding_id desc
